title: Sans The Skeleton: An Origins Addon
description: Traverse the world of minecraft as Sans from Undertale!
body:
# Sans The Skeleton: The Weakest Origin

This mod brings Sans The Skeleton in the world of minecraft.

You only have one heart, no defense. With that, how do you expect to survive the world? Defend yourself with the power of bones and gaster blasters! Judge mobs and their actions with your ability to inflict KARMA on others. Target their very soul in order to get an upper hand and be able to control and throw people around. Throw bones that do only 1 damage..? But they bypass Iframes!! Thats huge! You aren't sans right at the beginning. You must train, dodge, and work yourself down to the bone in order to master San's abilities. With a mysterious helper guiding you through your missions. 

If you'd like to skip the progression, just type "function:fullsans" to get all of sans' powers!
